heroDescription: MiniMax audio models support high-quality text-to-speech, voice design, music generation, and lyric creation workflows.
seoDescription: Compare MiniMax audio models on Novita AI, including Speech 2.8 HD, Speech 2.8 Turbo, Voice Design, Music, and Lyrics APIs.
overviewBody: MiniMax is a multimodal AI company with public model lines for speech, music, video, and agentic applications. This Novita AI collection focuses on the MiniMax audio models currently available for API integration.

The lineup includes Speech 2.8 HD and Turbo for synchronous or asynchronous text-to-speech, MiniMax Voice Design for creating custom voices from text descriptions, and MiniMax Music and Lyrics for music creation workflows.
Use this page to choose the right MiniMax audio model, then open a model page for parameters, pricing, and Playground testing.

lineupSections.title: MiniMax Speech 2.8
lineupSections.description: MiniMax Speech 2.8 variants generate multilingual text-to-speech audio, with HD variants prioritizing quality and Turbo variants prioritizing speed.
items: Use HD when naturalness and audio quality are more important.
Use Turbo for lower-latency or higher-volume speech generation.
Choose async endpoints for long-running jobs and sync endpoints for direct request-response workflows.

lineupSections.title: Voice and music creation
lineupSections.description: MiniMax also exposes tools for custom voice design, music generation, and lyric creation.
items: Use Voice Design to create reusable custom voice IDs from text descriptions.
Use MiniMax Music to generate songs from prompts and lyrics.
Use MiniMax Lyrics to draft or edit lyrics before music generation.

faq.question: What MiniMax models are available on Novita AI?
faq.answer: The MiniMax collection includes Speech 2.8 HD and Turbo, their async variants, MiniMax Voice Design, MiniMax Music, and MiniMax Lyrics.

faq.question: When should I use MiniMax Speech HD versus Turbo?
faq.answer: Use HD models when output quality and naturalness are the priority, and Turbo models when speed, cost, or high-volume generation matters more.

faq.question: Does this collection include MiniMax video models?
faq.answer: This launch collection focuses on the MiniMax audio models currently exposed through Novita AI model pages.

models.name: minimax-voice-design
